Notice Of Hearing And Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Wallace C. Doolittle (510-888-0603) for Plaintiff/opposing party Peter Berg, Christine Saunders, The Christine S. Saunders Irrevocable Trust UTD.
Julian T. Lastowski (415-296-0900) of Sheppard Uziel Law Firm for Defendant/Moving party Aina Stunz.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: contract interpretation, ambiguity, arbitration. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AINA STUNZ'S Petition To Compel Arbitration, Request For Stay Of Proceedings is taken under submission. Plaintiff's counsel to provide cases cited during oral argument to the court and opposing counsel by 4pm on 2/2/17. **If the Court finds the need for supplemental briefings they will be due no later than 2/15/17 and the matter will be put over to 2/23/17 as agreed upon by the parties.** Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Plaintiffs Motion For Preliminary Injunction Affecting Short Term Rental Of 1436 Taylor Street, San Francisco
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Wallace C. Doolittle (510-888-0603) for Plaintiff/Moving party Peter Berg, Christine Saunders, The Christine S. Saunders Irrevocable Trust UTD.
Julian T. Lastowski (415-296-0900) of Sheppard Uziel Law Firm for Defendant/opposing party Aina Stunz.

The court announces the tentative ruling and hears the matter concurrently with the motion to compel. Hearing is held. Argued re: harm, HOA ins. policy and commerical policy. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS PETER BERG, CHRISTINE SAUNDERS, THE CHRISTINE S. SAUNDERS IRREVOCABLE TRUST'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction Affecting Short Term Rental Of 1436 Taylor Street, San Francisco is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
